executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run ALL tests at these 5 viewport sizes: 375px (mobile), 414px (mobile large), 768px (tablet), 1280px (desktop), 1920px (wide). For each test, verify: no horizontal overflow, header stays visible and readable, form input and button are accessible, result panels stack correctly on mobile and go side-by-side on desktop, MBFC badges wrap properly, topic tree is scrollable on small screens, Layer 4 bar fits within viewport. Flag any layout breakage, text overflow, or elements hidden behind other elements.
